User.title: User
User.description: A user profile entity containing role and posting permissions.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user (same as Auth UID).

displayName.description: The user's display name or nickname.

isAdmin.description: Whether this user is a full manager/admin of the app.

canPostBlog.description: Whether this employee can draft/manage blog posts.

canPostPortfolio.description: Whether this employee can draft/manage portfolio items.

Post.title: Blog Post
Post.description: A blog post entity containing content and metadata.

category.description: Category of the post (e.g., JOURNEY, VALUES).

image.description: URL of the post's featured image.

content.description: Full content of the blog post.

featured.description: Whether the post is featured on the main blog page.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

authorUid.description: UID of the author who created the post.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio Item
Portfolio.description: A portfolio item entity containing images and details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the portfolio item.
